events.description: Jumping Jacks is an hour-long class encouraging creative movement, balance, and hand-eye coordination in a high-energy, fun-filled atmosphere. The first half is free play with parents/caregivers interacting with children. The second half is group time with scarves, parachute, and bubbles. Crawling to 26 months session.
events.registration: Required — register at cityofsanrafael.org/recreation or call (415) 485-3333
events.notes: Series fee: $54-$96 for 12 classes. Drop-in: $10. Check current session dates at registration.

events.event_name: Sing & Stompers at Sweetwater Music Hall
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: A special offsite Sing & Stomp performance at the legendary Sweetwater Music Hall! Musician Emily Bonn and her band the Sing & Stompers bring high-energy bluegrass music, playful movement, and lots of fun for all ages. Don't forget your dancing shoes! Stroller parking is extremely limited.
events.registration: Required — register at millvalleylibrary.libcal.com. 120 seats available.
events.notes: Stroller parking extremely limited — consider leaving stroller at home.

events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Local School of Rock students perform at the legendary Sweetwater Music Hall. A fun daytime show for the whole family — watch the next generation of rock stars take the stage!
events.notes: Doors 9:30 AM, Show 10 AM. Tickets required.

events.event_name: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Grateful Dead for Kids
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: The Rock and Roll Playhouse presents Music of the Grateful Dead for Kids — a family-friendly concert experience perfect for Father's Day Weekend. Dancing, singing, and fun for all ages. Grateful Dads Father's Day Weekend Bash!
events.notes: Doors 11 AM, Show 11:30 AM. Father's Day Weekend. Tickets required.

events.venue: San Geronimo Valley Community Center — East Room
events.address: 6350 Sir Francis Drake Blvd, San Geronimo, CA 94963
events.description: A free, welcoming playgroup for caretakers and their little ones ages 0-5. A safe place to play, socialize, and connect with other families. Hosted by Playgroup Coordinator Perla de los Santos with lots of fun activities. The Marin County Free Library Learning Bus visits every other Tuesday from 10:30–11:15 AM.
events.notes: Runs until 12 PM. For more info email Perla at perladelossantos@parentservices.org. Learning Bus visits every other Tuesday 10:30–11:15 AM.
